global.title: Shell could walk away from offshore wind in $1 billion+ sell-off
global.summary: Shell is planning to sell its offshore wind farm assets in a deal that could raise more than $1 billion, Bloomberg reports.

global.title: The Chevy Equinox EV is now way more expensive to lease, but the Bolt is a bit cheaper
global.summary: America’s most affordable EV offering over 315 miles of range, as GM calls it, just got significantly more expensive to lease this month.

global.title: Toyota opens orders for its first body-on-frame EV pickup, starting at under $60,000
global.summary: The Hilux BEV arrives as Toyota’s first fully electric pickup and body-on-frame EV.

global.title: Podcast: Rivian R2 first drive, BYD goes nuts on flash charging, Donut Lab’s miracle battery is dead, and more
global.summary: In the Electrek Podcast, we discuss the most popular news in the world of sustainable transport and energy. In this week’s episode, we discuss our Rivian R2 first drive, BYD going nuts on flash charging, Donut Lab’s miracle battery being seemingly dead, and more.

global.title: BMW put the new iX3 through the paces, and it still drove 500 miles on a single charge
global.summary: BMW drove the new iX3 through heavy rain and snow on public roads, climbing over 6,500 feet up hills, and it still managed 500 miles without stopping to charge.

global.title: Anker SOLIX expanded 6,144Wh F3000 power station new $1,899 low, Heybike Ranger 3.0 Pro e-bike + Villain dirt bike lows, more
global.summary: We’ve got a ton of great weekend flash sale offers closing out this week’s Green Deals, starting with the six power station offers from Anker SOLIX that benefit from our exclusive bonus savings code, like the expanded 6,144Wh F3000 Portable Power Station hitting a new $1,899 low, amongst others. In

global.title: BYD is about to launch this full-size luxury electric sedan with over 1,000 km of range
global.summary: New details reveal the Great Han, BYD’s upcoming full-size luxury electric sedan, will offer a driving range of over 1,000 km (621 miles). Here’s what else we know.

global.title: BMW’s menacing new EV concept offers an early look at the first electric M3 [Images]
global.summary: BMW unveiled the M Concept Neue Klasse on Friday, offering a sneak peek at the all-electric quad-motor i3 M EV.

global.title: Xiaomi delivers on Tesla’s decade-old robot charger vision with new home robotic arm
global.summary: Xiaomi has unveiled a home robotic arm charger that autonomously plugs and unplugs your EV — delivering on a concept that Tesla prototyped over a decade ago but never brought to market. The compact device, only 152 mm wide, is designed to fit in tight home garage parking spaces and integrates into X

global.title: Non-bike bike gear tested: H2O Audio’s TRI 2 bone conduction headphones
global.summary: I love listening to music, podcasts, and audiobooks when I’m riding my e-bikes. Depending on the type of ride I’m doing, I’ve got an affinity for all of them.
